tool.name: Lix plugin API candidate D: host-owned transactional private KV
tool.install: included in the isolated Lix research workspace

task: Implement and test the assigned Text, CSV, JSON, or Markdown plugin task

config.prompt_template: Implement and test the {format} plugin task at {task_path} in {isolated_workspace} using {candidate_api_path}

overrides.temperature: Codex collaboration agents do not expose temperature; 0 records the requested nominal setting, not a verified provider setting
overrides.tools: Codex functions.exec and collaboration.send_message replaced the pinned Claude Code tool list; apply_patch and shell execution were nested under functions.exec
overrides.mcp_servers: Codex does not expose per-agent MCP stripping; no MCP calls were observed in the scored transcripts
overrides.system_prompt: Codex collaboration agents use the Codex system/developer instructions and cannot run with no system prompt
overrides.mode: Codex workspace-write sandbox policy replaced bypassPermissions
overrides.max_turns: Codex collaboration agents do not expose a hard turn cap; 40 records the requested nominal limit

agents.success_reason: Submission implements the Candidate D text plugin, covers all seven required behaviors with focused tests, preserves duplicate and terminal-line IDs correctly, uses retry-stable allocation, and independently reruns successfully with 8 tests passing.
first_3_commands: sed -n '1,240p' /private/tmp/lix-plugin-api-research.idNwOL/lix/experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/tasks/text.md && sed -n '1,280p' /private/tmp/lix-plugin-api-research.idNwOL/lix/experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src/candidate_d.rs && printf '\n-- run dir --\n' && find /private/tmp/lix-plugin-api-research.idNwOL/lix/experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/runs/final-active/agent-1 -maxdepth 3 -type f -print

sed -n '1,260p' Cargo.toml; sed -n '1,320p' src/lib.rs; sed -n '1,240p' README.md; printf '
-- SDK lib --
'; sed -n '1,360p' ../../../api-candidates/src/lib.rs; printf '
-- shared --
'; rg -n "pub (struct|enum|type)|impl .*Source|struct IdAllocator|struct PrivateIndex" ../../../api-candidates/src -g '*.rs'

agents.success_reason: Candidate D CSV plugin was implemented in the assigned workspace; all eight required behaviors have dedicated passing tests, and an independent cargo test rerun passed 8/8.
first_3_commands: cat Cargo.toml && sed -n '1,320p' src/lib.rs && sed -n '1,240p' README.md && sed -n '1,360p' ../../../../api-candidates/src/lib.rs

agents.success_reason: Implemented the JSON plugin in the assigned workspace without modifying the candidate SDK; the submission includes coverage for all eight required identity, transition, tombstone, escaping, rendering, and isolation behaviors, and an independent cargo test rerun passes.
first_3_commands: sed -n '1,260p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/runs/final-active/agent-1/src/lib.rs; sed -n '1,200p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/runs/final-active/agent-1/Cargo.toml; sed -n '1,360p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src/lib.rs; rg -n "struct (Change|ChangeSet|Entity|PrivateIndex|IdAllocator)|enum Change|impl .*PrivateIndex|candidate_d" experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/runs -g '*.rs' | head -200

agents.success_reason: Implemented Candidate D Markdown plugin and eight focused tests covering every required behavior; cargo clippy passed and cargo test independently reran successfully with 8/8 tests passing.
first_3_commands: sed -n '1,240p' /private/tmp/lix-plugin-api-research.idNwOL/lix/experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/tasks/markdown.md && sed -n '1,280p' /private/tmp/lix-plugin-api-research.idNwOL/lix/experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src/candidate_d.rs && printf '\n-- run files --\n' && find /private/tmp/lix-plugin-api-research.idNwOL/lix/experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/runs/final-active/agent-1 -maxdepth 3 -type f -print | sort

sed -n '1,240p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/runs/final-active/agent-1/{Cargo.toml,README.md,src/lib.rs}; sed -n '1,320p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src/lib.rs; rg -n "struct (Change|ChangeSet|Entity|PrivateIndex|IdAllocator)|enum Change|type Result|struct Source|struct FileEdits|struct Splice" experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src
sed -n '1,280p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src/types.rs; find experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/runs -path '*/src/lib.rs' -type f | head -20 | xargs rg -l 'candidate_d'

summary.common_first_command: sed -n '1,240p' /private/tmp/lix-plugin-api-research.idNwOL/lix/experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/tasks/text.md && sed -n '1,280p' /private/tmp/lix-plugin-api-research.idNwOL/lix/experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src/candidate_d.rs && printf '\n-- run dir --\n' && find /private/tmp/lix-plugin-api-research.idNwOL/lix/experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/runs/final-active/agent-1 -maxdepth 3 -type f -print (1/4)
